author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Wave 3 COMPLETE. All 3 agents delivered: 1) PyTorch .pt import with custom pickle parser (28 opcodes, f16/bf16 promotion, synthetic .pt testing) — 45 tests. 2) GPU conv2d via CPU im2col + cuBLAS SGEMM — 10 tests. 3) GPU allreduce/broadcast via TCP transport — 7 tests. All pure Rust, zero external C FFI.
